title: T-058 — UI: TEC-073 DLQ Manager (PARTIAL — drift resolve modal anchor)
prompt:
# T-058 — UI: TEC-073 DLQ Manager (PARTIAL — drift resolve modal anchor)

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §13.7, §13.8 TEC-073
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:562-598` (d365_drift_resolve_modal)

## Goal
DLQ row table + retry + mark-resolved actions.

Row click expands to error_message + payload viewer. Bulk retry button (admin only). Threshold banner when DLQ depth > 50. This is a partial/wrong-prototype anchor; if full parity is required, keep implementation blocked until a DLQ-specific prototype or spec-driven signoff exists.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/d365/dlq/page.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-073-dlq.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- Server retry logic (T-029)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the DLQ page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:562-598 (drift resolve modal as row-action anchor) and the UX contract at UX:1280, then table columns, row action modal layout, and Retry/Resolve buttons match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL with parity checklist in details.
2. Given DLQ depth > 50, when rendered, then warning banner appears.
3. Given user lacks technical.d365.sync.trigger, when on page, then row actions are disabled.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + threshold banner + RBAC.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-073-dlq.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not show secrets in payload viewer.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- D365 UI must present optional integration/export/import from Monopilot-owned data; any import/overwrite action must be authorized and audited, never silent or canonical-by-default.
- Do not claim full 1:1 prototype parity for DLQ; current modal anchor is drift-oriented and partial.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:562-598` (d365_drift_resolve_modal) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
